name: Employer uninsured for workers comp in Draper Utah, options?

mainEntity.name: Employer uninsured for workers comp in Draper Utah, options?

acceptedAnswer.description: Utah Uninsured Employers Fund covers you; file against employer who pays penalties. Benefits same as insured.[1] Key factors: prove non-coverage, employer liability. Labor Commission enforces, possible personal assets. Report promptly; lawyer accesses fund. Protection exists.
